hooks.command: $j=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; $fp=$j.tool_input.file_path; $tsDir='E:\Valheim Modding\Valheim ServerGuide\Thunderstore files\ValheimServerGuide'; $files=@('README.md','manifest.json','CHANGELOG.md','ValheimServerGuide.dll','icon.png'); $match=$files|Where-Object{$fp -like ('*\'+$_) -and $fp -like '*Thunderstore files*'}; if($match){$date=Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; $out='E:\Valheim Modding\Valheim ServerGuide\Thunderstore files\ValheimServerGuide_'+$date+'.zip'; $src=$files|ForEach-Object{Join-Path $tsDir $_}|Where-Object{Test-Path $_}; Compress-Archive -Path $src -DestinationPath $out -Force}

$j=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd=$j.tool_input.command; if($cmd -like '*dotnet build*' -or $cmd -like '*dotnet publish*'){$tsDir='E:\Valheim Modding\Valheim ServerGuide\Thunderstore files\ValheimServerGuide'; $files=@('README.md','manifest.json','CHANGELOG.md','ValheimServerGuide.dll','icon.png'); $date=Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; $out='E:\Valheim Modding\Valheim ServerGuide\Thunderstore files\ValheimServerGuide_'+$date+'.zip'; $src=$files|ForEach-Object{Join-Path $tsDir $_}|Where-Object{Test-Path $_}; if($src.Count -ge 1){Compress-Archive -Path $src -DestinationPath $out -Force}}
